title: crepis vesicaria var. haenseleri
intro: Crepis vesicaria var. haenseleri, also known as Haensel's hawk's beard, is a plant species within the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin irritations. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to create herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to take advantage of its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Additionally, Haensel's hawk's beard has been used to treat wounds and promote skin healing due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties.
